title: Case 73: Something with Three Legs
description: In 1973, multiple families in Enfield, Illinois reported encounters with a nine-foot creature that walked on three legs and had glowing red eyes. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 73: The Three-Legged Thing That Stalked Enfield...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: In April 1973, something impossible terrorized families in Enfield, Illinois. Nine feet tall with three legs and glowing red eyes. The encounters stopped as suddenly as they began. Subscribe for more classified cases from the Department of the Unknown.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
Something walked on three legs

In 1973, families in Enfield, Illinois reported encounters with a 9-foot creature. Gray skin, arms that dragged, and those three impossible legs. Multiple witnesses, identical descriptions, then it vanished.
